headline: Is Tractor Supply (TSCO) Now Attractive After A 41% One Year Share Price Fall
summary: If you are wondering whether Tractor Supply at US$30.57 is starting to look interesting, the key question is whether the current price fairly reflects what the business is worth. The stock is up 1.1% over the past week, but down 32.1% over the past month and down 41.2% over the last year, which will naturally raise questions about whether expectations and perceived risk have shifted too far. Recent coverage has focused on how this pullback has put Tractor Supply under closer scrutiny from...
